message:
chore: Add benchmark and web test artifacts to gitignore

Add entries for ephemeral build/test artifacts:
- target_bench_*/ - Benchmark-specific Rust build directories
- web/node_modules/ - npm packages
- web/playwright-report/ - Playwright test reports
- web/test-results/ - Test output
- web/test-fixtures/ - Test fixture data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -29,3 +29,12 @@ temp_*.rs
 
 # Local backup directories
 .local_backup_*/
+
+# Benchmark target directories
+target_bench_*/
+
+# Web test artifacts
+web/node_modules/
+web/playwright-report/
+web/test-results/
+web/test-fixtures/
